description_long: This object is a small bird with an elongated body and a streamlined profile, featuring a predominantly olive-brown plumage with subtle yellowish and darker brown tones. The head is darker, almost black, with a distinct pale spot near the eye, giving it a striking facial contrast. The beak is short, straight, and conical, well-suited for seed or insect consumption. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail is long and straight, tapering to a subtle point. The legs are slender and appear to be a muted brown or gray color. The overall feather pattern is smooth and uniform, with no prominent barring or spotting.
description: A small, olive-brown bird with a dark head, pale eye spot, and a long, straight tail. Its plumage is smooth and uniform, with subtle color gradients.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, dark head, pale eye spot, and long, straight tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the bird's back, tail alignment, and the subtle color gradient along the body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same elongated body, dark head, and tail, with the pale eye spot visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the bird's face, beak, and the symmetry of the head and body.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Smooth, uniform olive-brown with subtle gradients and a dark head; pale spot near the eye.
